Game.Name: Saikousoku Shikou Shogi Mahjong
Game.Plot: Saikousoku Shikou Shogi Mahjong ("Fastest Thinking Shogi Mahjong") is a mahjong and shogi game for the Super Famicom. It follows similar games that tried to combine more than one board game mode together for the sake of versatility, such as Super Gomoku Shogi which combined Go and Shogi. The player can select either mode from the main menu and play a barebones version of their chosen game. Each game has a different selection of CPU characters to play against.
